evidence.claim: Designed the ranking layer for LinkedIn's flagship product
evidence.source_text: Designed the ranking layer for the company's flagship product

evidence.claim: Managed data pipelines, evaluation frameworks, and production health for ranking systems
evidence.source_text: The hard problem was rarely the modeling — it was the data pipeline that fed the models, the evaluation framework that told us whether they worked, and the operational discipline of keeping all of it healthy in production.

evidence.claim: Owned ranking layer, data pipelines, and evaluation frameworks for 14 months
evidence.source_text: I owned all three across roughly 14 months.

evidence.claim: Owned search and discovery experience end-to-end at Yellow.ai
evidence.source_text: Owned the search and discovery experience end-to-end at a consumer product

evidence.claim: Built offline metrics that correlated with online engagement
evidence.source_text: building offline metrics that actually correlated with online engagement

evidence.claim: Collaborated directly with product/PM on defining user relevance
evidence.source_text: direct collaboration with product/PM on what 'relevance' actually means for our users.

evidence.claim: Strong preference for shipping real systems over research-only work
evidence.source_text: Strong preference for shipping real systems over research-only work; I'd rather have a working v1 in 6 weeks than a perfect v2 in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Learned from past mistakes in over-engineering and optimizing non-impactful metrics
evidence.source_text: I've made the standard mistakes — over-engineering early, optimizing offline metrics that didn't move online numbers, building beautiful infrastructure for features that users didn't actually want — so I notice them faster now.

evidence.claim: Proficiency in PEFT, Haystack, Time Series, Machine Learning, Information Retrieval Systems, Search Infrastructure, Image Classification, TTS, Feature Engineering, ETL, Model Adaptation, Indexing Algorithms, Workflow Orchestration, Search Backend, Python, Vector Representations
evidence.source_text: Skills: PEFT (advanced, 33mo, 5 endorsements); Haystack (advanced, 43mo, 36 endorsements); Time Series (advanced, 28mo, 0 endorsements); Machine Learning (expert, 61mo, 23 endorsements); Information Retrieval Systems (advanced, 58mo, 32 endorsements); Search Infrastructure (expert, 83mo, 37 endorsements); Image Classification (advanced, 22mo, 37 endorsements); TTS (intermediate, 24mo, 3 endorsements); Feature Engineering (advanced, 27mo, 9 endorsements); ETL (intermediate, 14mo, 8 endorsements); Model Adaptation (expert, 79mo, 54 endorsements); Indexing Algorithms (expert, 39mo, 56 endorsements); Workflow Orchestration (expert, 62mo, 59 endorsements); Search Backend (advanced, 23mo, 10 endorsements); Python (expert, 72mo, 38 endorsements); Vector Representations (expert, 41mo, 55 endorsements)
